Container.Name: shopping-companion
Container.Overview: ⚠️ REFERENCE ONLY — This template documents the available settings. To run the full app (frontend + backend + worker + database) use Docker Compose Manager plugin with the compose file at: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chisss07/ShoppingCompanion/main/unraid/docker-compose.yml — Add Stack → paste that URL → fill in the fields → Compose Up.
Container.Description: AI-powered shopping price comparison across Amazon, Best Buy, eBay, and more with Claude AI summaries. IMPORTANT: This app requires 6 containers (frontend, backend, worker, websocket, postgres, redis). Do NOT start this template directly — it will only run the frontend and searches will fail. Instead: install Docker Compose Manager from Community Apps, click Add Stack, paste https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chisss07/ShoppingCompanion/main/unraid/docker-compose.yml as the compose URL, fill in your API keys in the form, and click Compose Up.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port to access the Shopping Companion web UI (maps to container port 80)

Config.Name: AppData Path
Config.Description: Base folder on the Unraid host where all app data is stored. PostgreSQL files will be saved in a 'postgres' subfolder and Redis in a 'redis' subfolder. Change to /mnt/cache/appdata/shopping-companion to store on the cache drive.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Required. Your Anthropic Claude API key — get one at console.anthropic.com. Powers AI summaries and alternative model detection.

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Password
Config.Description: Required. Password for the PostgreSQL database. Choose something strong — used internally only.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required. Random 64-char secret for signing tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Best Buy API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Best Buy Products API key — developer.bestbuy.com

Config.Name: SerpAPI Key (Google Shopping)
Config.Description: Optional. SerpAPI key for Google Shopping results — serpapi.com

Config.Name: eBay App ID
Config.Description: Optional. eBay Browse API App ID — developer.ebay.com

Config.Name: eBay Cert ID
Config.Description: Optional. eBay Browse API Cert ID

Config.Name: eBay OAuth Token
Config.Description: Optional. eBay OAuth Client Credentials token

Config.Name: Amazon Access Key
Config.Description: Optional. Amazon Product Advertising API 5.0 Access Key

Config.Name: Amazon Secret Key
Config.Description: Optional. Amazon Product Advertising API 5.0 Secret Key

Config.Name: Amazon Partner Tag
Config.Description: Optional. Amazon Associates Partner Tag (e.g. mysite-20)

Config.Name: Walmart Consumer ID
Config.Description: Optional. Walmart Open API Consumer ID — developer.walmart.com

Config.Name: Walmart Private Key
Config.Description: Optional. Walmart Open API Private Key (RSA, base64-encoded)

Config.Name: PostgreSQL User
Config.Description: PostgreSQL username (internal)

Config.Name: PostgreSQL Database
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database name (internal)

Config.Name: Searches Per Minute (rate limit)
Config.Description: Max searches per minute per IP address

Config.Name: Searches Per Day (rate limit)
Config.Description: Max searches per day per IP address

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warning, error
